creator: avos@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 169803
Makefile.diff

- Drop qt5-x11extras, qt5-svg, qt5-linguist dependencies; use qt5-buildtools for build time only.
 * Add qt5-webkit and qt5-widgets as a runtime dependencies; they were hidden by qt5-linguist previously.
- Allow to change notifications style via WEBKITNOTIFY option.
- Pet portlint (use tab instead of spaces for variable assignment).
- Bump PORTREVISION.
